name: administrator
description: Administrators who have full access to the system and can manage users, settings, and overall functionality.

name: developer
description: Environment for developers to build, test, and deploy applications.

name: member
description: Default user with the lowest level of access who signs up

name: commerce
description: Collection of paid services including cloud computing, VPN, and other premium infrastructure solutions.

name: enterprise
description: Exclusive services designed for businesses, providing advanced cloud solutions, dedicated infrastructure, and enterprise-grade security.

name: reseller
description: Tailored for businesses and individuals looking to resell services, this plan offers full white-label capabilities, scalable resources
